expectations.text: Merged tmux.conf preserves user's custom settings (base-index 1, status-bg, status-fg, bind r)
expectations.evidence: tmux_conf_written.txt lines 3-7 preserve base-index, status-bg, status-fg, and bind r. Original comment '# My custom tmux config' also preserved.
conflict_warnings.txt: 'default-terminal: "screen-256color" vs "tmux-256color"' with explanation about legacy value causing rendering issues
conflict_warnings.txt: 'history-limit: 50000 vs 250000' with explanation about scroll overflow
conflict_warnings.txt: 'escape-time: 50 vs 0' with explanation about input lag

expectations.text: Does NOT duplicate 'set -g mouse on' (already exists in original)
expectations.evidence: Only one 'mouse on' in tmux_conf_written.txt (line 2). Merge analysis table shows: 'Same — keep user's line, do not duplicate'

expectations.text: Transcript shows the agent warned the user about conflicts before changing values
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows 3 explicit user prompts with y/n for each conflict, e.g., 'Your tmux.conf sets default-terminal to "screen-256color"... Update? (y/n)'
